rationale: CCC Domain E ("Participatory Curriculum Innovation") also relates to DigCompEdu 6.2 ("Digital communication and collaboration", within Area 6: Facilitating Learners' Digital Competence). DigCompEdu 6.2 is framed around teachers facilitating students' collaborative digital competence; CCC Domain E is about teachers themselves participating as contributors in open curriculum-infrastructure communities (cf. OE-ALIGN-000012's KMK-2.3 alignment, which addresses the more general collaborative-tool-use precursor). Recorded as a second, independent relatedMatch since the two source competencies address related but distinct audiences (facilitating student collaboration vs. teachers' own professional collaboration) that both bear on CCC Domain E without either one subsuming it.
subject: CCC-v1.0.0:OE-COMPETENCY-001020
